message:
perf(record,types,infra): migrate BTreeMap/BTreeSet to HashMap/HashSet across obligation, symbol, and infrastructure modules

Continues the ongoing ordered-to-unordered map migration across modules where
iteration order is never relied upon:

- SymbolObligationTracker: obligations, by_symbol, by_object indexes
  (BTreeMap → HashMap). Lookups by ID dominate; no sorted iteration needed.

- SymbolicObligationRegistry: by_id, by_object, by_holder, by_region maps
  (BTreeMap → HashMap). All access patterns are point lookups or full scans.

- SymbolSet: symbols and block_counts maps (BTreeMap → HashMap). Threshold
  tracking only needs membership/count, not sorted traversal.

- HashRing: nodes set (BTreeSet → HashSet). The ring vector provides ordering
  for consistent hashing; the nodes set is only for add/remove/contains.

- HealthService: statuses map and builder (BTreeMap → HashMap). Service health
  lookups are by exact name.

- NatsClient: subscriptions map (BTreeMap → HashMap). Subscription IDs are
  monotonic integers used for point lookup.

- ConnectionManager: connection state map (BTreeMap → HashMap). Active
  connections are accessed by ConnectionId.

- SymbolTraceCollector: traces map (BTreeMap → HashMap). Eviction scans all
  entries anyway; sorted order provides no benefit.

- DeadlineMonitor: monitored tasks and history maps (BTreeMap → HashMap),
  per-scan seen set (BTreeSet → HashSet).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
